ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EXTEND PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR TWELVE MONTHS FROM JANUARY 25,2012 THROUGH JANUARY 24, 2013. ACCEPT AND INCORPORATE YEAR 7 RATE PROPOSAL DATED SEPTEMEBER 13, 2011, COVERING THE PERIOD OF SEPTEMBER 25, 2011 TO SEPTEMBER 24, 2012.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
